creator: bubnovky@gmail.com
text:
Guest OS Rocky Linux 9.1 freezes sporadically

Config quest vm:

loader="grub"
cpu=2
memory=8G
network0_type="virtio-net"
network0_switch="public"
disk0_type="virtio-blk"
disk0_name="disk0.img"
grub_install0="linux /isolinux/vmlinuz inst.vnc inst.graphical inst.gpt"
grub_install1="initrd /isolinux/initrd.img"
grub_run_dir="/grub2"
uuid="b38c84ab-f3f1-11ed-86c8-38d547c91d61"
network0_mac="58:9c:fc:0b:40:81"

Guest log when freezes:
May 18 08:03:17 zabbix.itspr.ru kernel: watchdog: BUG: soft lockup - CPU#1 stuck for 22s! [kworker/1:1:289808]
